title: hypericum erectum f. angustifolium
intro: Hypericum erectum f. angustifolium, also known as St. John's wort narrow-leaved, is a perennial plant species within the St. John's wort family, characterized by its narrow, lance-shaped leaves and clusters of small, yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hypericum erectum f. angustifolium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Hypericum erectum f. angustifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
